---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Courses I've taught and assisted with."
title-block-banner: false
---

## Calculus

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/calculus.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**University of Minnesota Duluth, Department of Mathematics and Statistics**\
**Teaching Assistant**\
[Fall 2025](#) 
[Spring 2026](#)

A foundational course in algebraic reasoning, equations, and functions.
:::
:::::

## Differential Equation

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/Differentialequation.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**University of Minnesota Duluth, Department of Mathematics and Statistics**\
**Instructor**\
[Fall 2025](#) 
[Spring 2026](#)

An undergraduate course covering data collection, exploratory data analysis, probability, and statistical inference.
:::
:::::

## Statistical Inference

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/Inference.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**University of Ghana, Department of Statistics and Actuarial Science**\
**Teaching Assistant**\
[Spring 2024](#)

Topics include limits, derivatives, applications, and an introduction to integrals.
:::
:::::

## Introduction to Biostatistics

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/close.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**University of Ghana, Department of Statistics Actuarial Science**\
**Teaching Assistant**\
[Summer 2024](#)

Covered study design, categorical data analysis, hypothesis testing and survival analysis.
:::
:::::

## Advanced Linear Regression

::::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
![](files/images/regression.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}
**University of Ghana, Department of Statistics**\
**Teaching Assistant**\
[Spring 2024](#)

Focused on theoretical and applied aspects of multiple regression, model diagnostics, and interaction effects.
:::
:::::
---
